steps.title: Make nanoparticles possessive
steps.content: The sentence says nanoengineers leverage properties belonging to palladium nanoparticles. Because "nanoparticles" is plural and already ends in s, the possessive form needs only an apostrophe after the final s.

steps.title: Reject wrong possessive forms
steps.content: Choice A has no possessive marker. Choice B uses the singular possessive "nanoparticle's," though the sentence refers to multiple nanoparticles. Choice C adds an extra apostrophe after "properties." The correct form is plural possessive. The answer is D.
